mapper.select: SELECT shop_id AS shopId, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS totalBuyUser, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_first_buy = 1 THEN user_id END) AS firstBuyUser, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_first_buy = 0 THEN user_id END) AS repurchaseUser, COUNT(*) AS totalOrderCnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_first_buy = 0 THEN 1 END) AS repurchaseOrderCnt, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS totalPayAmount FROM user_shop_pay_detail WHERE DATE(pay_time) = #{statDate} AND is_valid = 1 GROUP BY shop_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO shop_daily_repurchase_stat ( shop_id, stat_date, total_buy_user, first_buy_user, repurchase_user, repurchase_rate, total_order_cnt, repurchase_order_cnt, total_pay_amount, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.shopId}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.totalBuyUser}, #{item.firstBuyUser}, #{item.repurchaseUser}, #{item.repurchaseRate}, #{item.totalOrderCnt}, #{item.repurchaseOrderCnt}, #{item.totalPayAmount}, NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_buy_user = VALUES(total_buy_user), first_buy_user = VALUES(first_buy_user), repurchase_user = VALUES(repurchase_user), repurchase_rate = VALUES(repurchase_rate), total_order_cnt = VALUES(total_order_cnt), repurchase_order_cnt = VALUES(repurchase_order_cnt), total_pay_amount = VALUES(total_pay_amount)
